put.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Sets an execution to call a target or include the targets of another execution.
 Setting an empty list of targets will remove all targets from the execution, making it a noop.

 Required permission:
   - `action.execution.write`

get.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 List all available functions which can be used as condition for executions.

Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 List all available methods which can be used as condition for executions.

post.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 List all matching executions. By default all executions of the instance are returned that have at least one execution target.
 Make sure to include a limit and sorting for pagination.

 Required permission:
   - `action.execution.read`

get.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 List all available services which can be used as condition for executions.

post.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Create a new target to your endpoint, which can be used in executions.

 Required permission:
   - `action.target.write`

Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 List all matching targets. By default all targets of the instance are returned.
 Make sure to include a limit and sorting for pagination.

 Required permission:
   - `action.target.read`

get.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Returns the target identified by the requested ID.

 Required permission:
   - `action.target.read`

post.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Update an existing target.
 To generate a new signing key set the optional expirationSigningKey.

 Required permission:
   - `action.target.write`

timeout.title: timeout
timeout.description:
Timeout defines the duration until Zitadel cancels the execution.
 If the target doesn't respond before this timeout expires, then the connection is closed and the action fails. Depending on the target type and possible setting on `interrupt_on_error` following targets will not be called. In case of a `rest_async` target only this specific target will fail, without any influence on other targets of the same execution.

expirationSigningKey.title: expiration_signing_key
expirationSigningKey.description:
Regenerate the key used for signing and checking the payload sent to the target.
 Set the graceful period for the existing key. During that time, the previous
 signing key and the new one will be used to sign the request to allow you a smooth
 transition onf your API.

 Note that we currently only allow an immediate rotation ("0s") and will support
 longer expirations in the future.

restAsync.title: rest_async
restAsync.description: Call is executed in parallel to others, Zitadel does not wait until the call is finished. The state is ignored, call is sent as post.

restCall.title: rest_call
restCall.description: Wait for response and response body is used, status is checked, call is sent as post.

restWebhook.title: rest_webhook
restWebhook.description: Wait for response but response body is ignored, status is checked, call is sent as post.

delete.description:
Deprecated: please move to the corresponding endpoint under action service v2. This endpoint will be removed with the next major version of ZITADEL.

 Delete an existing target. This will remove it from any configured execution as well.
 In case the target is not found, the request will return a successful response as
 the desired state is already achieved.

 Required permission:
   - `action.target.delete`

event.title: event
event.description: Condition-type to execute if an event is created in the system.

function.title: function
function.description: Condition-type to execute if function is used, replaces actions v1.

request.title: request
request.description: Condition-type to execute if a request on the defined API point happens.

response.title: response
response.description: Condition-type to execute on response if a request on the defined API point happens.

timeout.title: timeout
timeout.description:
Timeout defines the duration until Zitadel cancels the execution.
 If the target doesn't respond before this timeout expires, then the connection is closed and the action fails. Depending on the target type and possible setting on `interrupt_on_error` following targets will not be called. In case of a `rest_async` target only this specific target will fail, without any influence on other targets of the same execution.

restAsync.title: rest_async
restAsync.description: Call is executed in parallel to others, Zitadel does not wait until the call is finished. The state is ignored, call is sent as post.

restCall.title: rest_call
restCall.description: Wait for response and response body is used, status is checked, call is sent as post.

restWebhook.title: rest_webhook
restWebhook.description: Wait for response but response body is ignored, status is checked, call is sent as post.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the newly created target.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the target creation.

signingKey.title: signing_key
signingKey.description: Key used to sign and check payload sent to the target.

deletionDate.title: deletion_date
deletionDate.description:
The timestamp of the deletion of the target.
 Note that the deletion date is only guaranteed to be set if the deletion was successful during the request.
 In case the deletion occurred in a previous request, the deletion date might be empty.

group.title: group
group.description: Event group as condition, all events under this group.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the execution creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the execution.

targets.title: targets
targets.description: Ordered list of targets called during the execution.

executionType.title: execution_type
executionType.description: Defines the type to query for.

conditions.title: conditions
conditions.description: Defines the conditions to query for.

targetIds.title: target_ids
targetIds.description: Defines the ids to query for.

sortingColumn.title: sorting_column
sortingColumn.description: The field the result is sorted by. The default is the creation date. Beware that if you change this, your result pagination might be inconsistent.

filters.title: filters
filters.description: Define the criteria to query for.

sortingColumn.title: sorting_column
sortingColumn.description: The field the result is sorted by. The default is the creation date. Beware that if you change this, your result pagination might be inconsistent.

filters.title: filters
filters.description: Define the criteria to query for.

interruptOnError.title: interrupt_on_error
interruptOnError.description: Define if any error stops the whole execution. By default the process continues as normal.

interruptOnError.title: interrupt_on_error
interruptOnError.description: Define if any error stops the whole execution. By default the process continues as normal.

all.title: all
all.description: All calls to any available services and methods as condition.

all.title: all
all.description: All calls to any available services and methods as condition.

condition.title: condition
condition.description: Condition defining when the execution should be used.

targets.title: targets
targets.description: Ordered list of targets called during the execution.

setDate.title: set_date
setDate.description: The timestamp of the execution set.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the target.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the target creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the target (e.g. creation, activation, deactivation).

timeout.title: timeout
timeout.description:
Timeout defines the duration until Zitadel cancels the execution.
 If the target doesn't respond before this timeout expires, the the connection is closed and the action fails. Depending on the target type and possible setting on `interrupt_on_error` following targets will not be called. In case of a `rest_async` target only this specific target will fail, without any influence on other targets of the same execution.

targetId.title: target_id
targetId.description: Defines the id to query for.

targetName.title: target_name
targetName.description: Defines the name of the target to query for.

method.title: method
method.description: Defines which text comparison method used for the name query.

timeout.description:
Timeout defines the duration until Zitadel cancels the execution.
 If the target doesn't respond before this timeout expires, then the connection is closed and the action fails. Depending on the target type and possible setting on `interrupt_on_error` following targets will not be called. In case of a `rest_async` target only this specific target will fail, without any influence on other targets of the same execution.

expirationSigningKey.title: expiration_signing_key
expirationSigningKey.description:
Regenerate the key used for signing and checking the payload sent to the target.
 Set the graceful period for the existing key. During that time, the previous
 signing key and the new one will be used to sign the request to allow you a smooth
 transition onf your API.

 Note that we currently only allow an immediate rotation ("0s") and will support
 longer expirations in the future.

restAsync.title: rest_async
restAsync.description: Call is executed in parallel to others, Zitadel does not wait until the call is finished. The state is ignored, call is sent as post.

restCall.title: rest_call
restCall.description: Wait for response and response body is used, status is checked, call is sent as post.

restWebhook.title: rest_webhook
restWebhook.description: Wait for response but response body is ignored, status is checked, call is sent as post.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the change of the target.

signingKey.title: signing_key
signingKey.description: Key used to sign and check payload sent to the target.

offset.title: offset
offset.description: Starting point for retrieval, in combination of offset used to query a set list of objects.

limit.title: limit
limit.description:
limit is the maximum amount of objects returned. The default is set to 100
 with a maximum of 1000 in the runtime configuration.
 If the limit exceeds the maximum configured Zitadel will throw an error.
 If no limit is present the default is taken.

asc.title: asc
asc.description:
Asc is the sorting order. If true the list is sorted ascending, if false
 the list is sorted descending. The default is descending.

totalResult.title: total_result
totalResult.description: Absolute number of objects matching the query, regardless of applied limit.

appliedLimit.title: applied_limit
appliedLimit.description: Applied limit from query, defines maximum amount of objects per request, to compare if all objects are returned.

tags.name: zitadel.action.v2beta.ActionService
tags.description:
Service to manage custom executions.
 The service provides methods to create, update, delete and list targets and executions.

 Deprecated: use action service v2 instead. This service will be removed in the next major version of ZITADEL.
